flows.notes: primary-anonymous STILL shows all-caps tier chips FREE/STANDARD/FREE/FREE on the 4 consumer discovery cards (Advanced Algebra Study, Geometry Masters, Indie Game Dev Collective, Language Exchange). V-R17 BLOCK PERSISTS on anonymous view. primary-tenant-user correctly shows Title-Case Free/Premium/Standard/Free/Premium/Free. primary-tenant-admin table shows Title-Case Free/Premium/Standard/Free/Premium/Free and Invite-only. primary-platform-support is an empty shell (no cards). Root cause: anonymous-only code path still renders raw uppercase tier token rather than humanized label.

primary-tenant-user 'Your attendance' card now shows 'Confirmed' + 'Checked in' Title-Case chips and 'Reference: Guest #001' humanized — V-R17 BLOCK RESOLVED. primary-event-organiser and primary-tenant-admin RSVPs list all show Guest #001..005 + Confirmed/Waitlisted/Checked in. primary-anonymous shows only Sign-in CTA (no chips). NOTE: tenant-admin Refund Requests section still shows raw att-002/att-005/ref-001/ref-002 — but this was NOT the V-R17 BLOCK scope (BLOCK was tenant-user 'Your attendance' card only), so logged as residual concern not a regression.

primary-platform-admin curator Review Queue now shows 3 package cards (Event Raffle Manager, Stripe Payment Gateway, Analytics Dashboard Pro) each with Title-Case 'Listed' chip — consistent with populated-anonymous. V-R17 CONCERN RESOLVED. primary-tenant-admin shows Browse Flow Templates + My Installed Flows with Install/Fork/Update action buttons; no status chips rendered on this view (no producer 'My Published Flows' section present in current primary-tenant-admin capture, so producer chip humanization cannot be verified here — but the curator-side token that was raised in V-R17 is fixed).

primary-business-partner Partner Invoicing table now shows 'Invoice #B-001', 'Invoice #B-002', 'Invoice #B-003' + 'PO #2026-0012', 'PO #2026-0015', 'PO #2026-0018' (humanized from raw INV-B-001/PO-2026-0012) and status chips 'Paid'/'Paid'/'Due' in Title-Case (humanized from PAID/DUE). V-R17 CONCERN FULLY RESOLVED.
